title: Fragments On Nature And Life - The Earth
content:
Our eyeless bark sails free
    Though with boom and spar
    Andes, Alp or Himmalee,
    Strikes never moon or star.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Fragments On Nature And Life - The Earth"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
